output.answer: Manchester United F.C. has never won the FIFA World Cup, as it is an international tournament for national teams, not football clubs. They have won the FIFA Club World Cup (not the World Cup) in 2008.
output.formatted:
Manchester United F.C. has never won the FIFA World Cup, as it is an international tournament for national teams, not football clubs. They have won the FIFA Club World Cup (not the World Cup) in 2008.

SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
SELECT ?year WHERE {
  wd:Q3102 wdt:P199 ?title .
  ?title wdt:P585 ?year
}
```

Execution result:
Got no rows and 1 columns
